name: 21_Iris_Classification_SVM_Iris_ML
query: Ninaomba mradi wa kuainisha aina za iris kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Iris na kisanidi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kilichotekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Mradi unapaswa kusawazisha data na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`. Itarekodi usahihi wa uainishaji na kuihifadhi kama `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt`, na itazalisha na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia itaunda programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`. Ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, na maelezo mafupi ya modeli kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

requirements.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiwaruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza kwa urahisi vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa modeli.
Maelezo mafupi ya modeli yanapaswa kujumuishwa kwenye ukurasa wa wavuti, kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The files provided (`data_loader.py` and `model.py`) are merely placeholder/stub implementations that do not actually load or use the Iris dataset. The `load_dataset()` function in `data_loader.py` returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no actual reference to the Iris dataset (e.g., no `sklearn.datasets.load_iris()`, no CSV file loading, no real data). There is no evidence anywhere in the codebase that the Iris dataset is genuinely utilized.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a hardcoded string `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and does not perform any actual data loading or standardization/scaling of features. The `build_transforms()` function returns a list of strings like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` but these are just string literals, not actual data transformation operations. There is no use of any standardization library (e.g., `sklearn.preprocessing.StandardScaler`) or any real implementation that normalizes feature values to the same range. The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual feature selection logic. The content shows only a placeholder implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a static dictionary and a `build_transforms()` function returning a hardcoded list. There is no real feature selection code (e.g., using `SelectKBest`, `PCA`, `feature_importances_`, or any similar technique) to identify important features. The `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely mentions feature selection as a string description, but no actual implementation exists.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual SVM classifier implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub code with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no import of `sklearn.svm.SVC` or any other SVM library, no model training, no fitting, and no actual SVM classifier logic whatsoever. The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it was designed to appear compliant without actually implementing the required functionality.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual classification accuracy results. This indicates that real accuracy metrics were never computed and saved to the file — it holds dummy/placeholder content rather than genuine model evaluation results.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The file `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists in the project structure as shown in the workspace tree. Although the image could not be read/displayed due to a technical error in the evaluation system (media type mismatch during base64 encoding), the file itself is present at the correct path `results\figures\confusion_matrix.png`, confirming it was generated and saved as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/app.py` file does not contain a real Streamlit interactive web application. Instead, it contains only a stub/placeholder implementation that defines metadata strings and a `main()` function returning a dictionary. There is no actual Streamlit code (e.g., `import streamlit as st`, `st.title()`, `st.image()`, etc.), no display of classification results, and no loading or rendering of images from `results/figures/`. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging," confirming it is not a functional Streamlit application.
